question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the actual chapters of the thesis. Instead, it lists the structural requirements of an introduction (reiterating the instructions). You need to replace the list of introduction parts with the actual names and content of your thesis chapters.

question: Description
feedback: The text fails to describe the contents of the thesis chapters because it only lists the structural components of an introduction. You should provide a brief summary of what each of your specific chapters contains.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not clear because the text describes the structure of an 'Introduction' rather than the structure of the entire thesis work. The reader cannot see the roadmap of your research, only the roadmap of your intro.
